'''βàödh-s-dh-h''' ('''kadhasdhehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jimmy|jimmy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jimmy|jimmy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàödh-s-dh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kadhasdhehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhasdhehoko|thidhasdhehoko]] || [[word:jidhasdhehoko|jidhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shidhasdhehoko|shidhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kidhasdhehoko|kidhasdhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhasdhehoko|thuthudhasdhehoko]] || [[word:jujudhasdhehoko|jujudhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shushudhasdhehoko|shushudhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kukudhasdhehoko|kukudhasdhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhasdhehoko|thudhasdhehoko]] || [[word:judhasdhehoko|judhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shudhasdhehoko|shudhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kudhasdhehoko|kudhasdhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhasdhehoko|thudhasdhehoko]] || [[word:judhasdhehoko|judhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shudhasdhehoko|shudhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kudhasdhehoko|kudhasdhehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhasdhehoko|thedhasdhehoko]] || [[word:jedhasdhehoko|jedhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shedhasdhehoko|shedhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kedhasdhehoko|kedhasdhehoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhasdhehoko|thodhasdhehoko]] || [[word:jodhasdhehoko|jodhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shodhasdhehoko|shodhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kodhasdhehoko|kodhasdhehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhasdhehoko|thodhasdhehoko]] || [[word:jodhasdhehoko|jodhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shodhasdhehoko|shodhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kodhasdhehoko|kodhasdhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠdhasdhehoko|thΟΠdhasdhehoko]] || [[word:jΟΠdhasdhehoko|jΟΠdhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shΟΠdhasdhehoko|shΟΠdhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kΟΠdhasdhehoko|kΟΠdhasdhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhasdhehoko|thathadhasdhehoko]] || [[word:jajadhasdhehoko|jajadhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shashadhasdhehoko|shashadhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kakadhasdhehoko|kakadhasdhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhasdhehoko|thadhasdhehoko]] || [[word:jadhasdhehoko|jadhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shadhasdhehoko|shadhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kadhasdhehoko|kadhasdhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhasdhehoko|thadhasdhehoko]] || [[word:jadhasdhehoko|jadhasdhehoko]] || [[word:shadhasdhehoko|shadhasdhehoko]] || [[word:kadhasdhehoko|kadhasdhehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhasdhehithi|shadhasdhehithi]] || [[word:shadhasdhehiji|shadhasdhehiji]] || [[word:shadhasdhehishi|shadhasdhehishi]] || [[word:shadhasdhehiki|shadhasdhehiki]]
